text: **Anna:** Hello everyone!
**Anna:** Today my {friend|友人/仲間|/frend/|My friend is kind.} Marcia is at her friend's house.
**Anna:** She says it is {beautiful|美しい|/ˈbjuːtɪfəl/|The sunset is beautiful.}
**Anna:** I want to see this house.
**Anna:** Here we are.
**Anna:** Marsha, I am in the {kitchen|台所|/ˈkɪtʃən/|I cook in the kitchen.}
**Anna:** It is a beautiful kitchen.
**Anna:** It is beautiful.
**Anna:** We {cook|料理する|/kʊk/|I cook dinner every day.} in the kitchen.
**Anna:** I {eat|食べる|/iːt/|I eat breakfast at home.} in the kitchen.
**Marsha:** We {relax|くつろぐ/リラックスする|/rɪˈlæks/|We relax after work.} in the living room.
**Anna:** I relax in the living room.
**Anna:** Marcia, let's go {upstairs|階上に|/ˈʌpsteərz/|We went upstairs to the bedroom.}
**Marsha:** Anna?
**Marsha:** Where are you?
**Anna:** Marsha, I am in the {bathroom|浴室/トイレ|/ˈbæθruːm/|I take a shower in the bathroom.}
**Anna:** I {wash|洗う|/wɒʃ/|I wash my hands before eating.} in the bathroom.
**Marsha:** I am in the {bedroom|寝室|/ˈbedruːm/|My bedroom is blue.}
**Marsha:** We {sleep|眠る|/sliːp/|I sleep eight hours every night.} in the bedroom.
**Marsha:** I sleep in the bedroom.
